steps.title: Spot the precision signal
steps.content: The passage shows that the Mexica used natural landmarks to track time and were able to precisely identify the dates of significant events. This word “precisely” is the key signal.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Exactitude” directly captures precision and accuracy. Precariousness contradicts the precise tracking described, while resilience and inconspicuousness relate to qualities never introduced in the passage. That matches choice B — B is correct.
